licenseClasses.name: Motorcycles & Tricycles
licenseClasses.description: All motorcycles (including boda bodas) and three-wheeled vehicles

licenseClasses.name: Light Motor Vehicles
licenseClasses.description: Cars, SUVs, pick-ups — vehicles not exceeding 3,500 kg GVW

licenseClasses.name: Heavy Motor Vehicles
licenseClasses.description: Trucks, lorries, buses — vehicles exceeding 3,500 kg GVW
requirements: Must already hold Class B for 2+ years
Driving school certificate for Class C

licenseClasses.name: Articulated Vehicles
requirements: Must hold Class C for 2+ years

licenseClasses.name: Driving Instructor
licenseClasses.description: Licensed driving instructors — authorized to train learners
requirements: Must hold Class B for 5+ years

licenseClasses.name: Tractors & Special Vehicles
licenseClasses.description: Agricultural tractors, forklifts, and other special-purpose vehicles

applicationProcess.title: Medical Examination (DL Form 1)
applicationProcess.description: Visit any registered medical practitioner for eyesight and general fitness examination

applicationProcess.title: Enrol at a Driving School
applicationProcess.description: Attend an NTSA-licensed driving school for practical training

applicationProcess.title: Apply for Provisional License
applicationProcess.description: Apply on eCitizen for an Interim Driving License (IDL) / provisional license

applicationProcess.title: Theory Test (Highway Code)
applicationProcess.description: Computer-based theory test at NTSA testing centre. Covers road signs, rules, and safety

applicationProcess.title: Practical Test
applicationProcess.description: Driving test at NTSA-designated testing ground. Includes road driving, parking, reversing

applicationProcess.title: Collect Driving License
applicationProcess.description: Pay for and collect your driving license from NTSA or Huduma Centre

renewalProcess.renewalPeriod: Every 3 years from date of issue
requirements: Medical form (DL Form 1) for Class C and above
